name: BB:FalsePositive: Proxy Server False Positive Events
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from proxy servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers and BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers building blocks.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Proxy Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (4254401) PROXY:WEB-GET, (4254404) PROXY:WEB-POST
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Proxy Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (4254401) PROXY:WEB-GET, (4254404) PROXY:WEB-POST
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:HostReference: Proxy Servers
